semantic.role: CI/CD workflow for automated release and npm publishing
responsibilities: Create a GitHub release with auto-generated release notes
outOfScope: Deployment to other registries or environments

English.purpose: Automates the release process for the ArchSpine project when a version tag is pushed.
English.context_and_audience: Intended for maintainers and developers who want to automate npm publishing and GitHub release creation. This workflow ensures consistent and repeatable release procedures.
key_takeaways: Triggered by any tag starting with 'v' (e.g., v1.0.0).
Publishes the built package to npm using the NPM_TOKEN secret.
Generates release notes and creates a GitHub release via the softprops/action-gh-release action.
